$comment: Site-wide content: brand, navigation, contact details and footer. Multilingual where relevant (fr/en/es/zh, manually translated). Menu content comes from the API; these static strings are hand-maintained. Edit phone/address/social here once your friend confirms the real values.

address.fr: 31 Av. du Régiment Normandie Niemen, 91700 Sainte-Geneviève-des-Bois
address.en: 31 Av. du Régiment Normandie Niemen, 91700 Sainte-Geneviève-des-Bois
address.es: 31 Av. du Régiment Normandie Niemen, 91700 Sainte-Geneviève-des-Bois
address.zh: 31 Av. du Régiment Normandie Niemen, 91700 Sainte-Geneviève-des-Bois

blurb.fr: Cuisine italienne authentique, faite maison et baignée de soleil.
blurb.en: Authentic Italian cooking, made in-house and bathed in sunshine.
blurb.es: Auténtica cocina italiana, casera y bañada por el sol.
blurb.zh: 正宗意大利美食，手工制作，沐浴阳光。

legal.fr: Tarifs nets, taxes et service compris
legal.en: Prices net, taxes and service included
legal.es: Precios netos, impuestos y servicio incluidos
legal.zh: 价格为净价，含税费和服务费

text.fr: Réservation conseillée, surtout le week-end. Appelez-nous, nous serons ravis de vous accueillir au soleil.
text.en: Booking recommended, especially at weekends. Call us — we'll be delighted to welcome you in the sun.
text.es: Se recomienda reservar, especialmente los fines de semana. Llámenos: estaremos encantados de recibirle bajo el sol.
text.zh: 建议预订，尤其是周末。请致电我们——我们很乐意在阳光下迎接您。
